items.titolo: China’s Open AI Models Are Challenging Silicon Valley’s Playbook
items.descrizione: As access to Anthropic’s and OpenAI’s frontier models becomes more restricted, Chinese labs are pitching their open-source alternatives as stable, accessible, and increasingly capable.

items.titolo: 3 ways Samsung deeply integrates Gemini AI into its new Galaxy devices
items.descrizione: Samsung Unpacked was as much about software as it was hardware.

items.titolo: Microsoft e Samsung investono in Mistral AI
items.descrizione: Microsoft ha sottoscritto un accordo con Mistral AI che prevede espansione dei data center, mentre Samsung dovrebbe investire un miliardo di dollari. The post Microsoft e Samsung investono in Mistral AI appeared first on
